calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Continued To Oct-28-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar as scheduled for Default Prove-up Hearing this date.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Court Reporter: Rhonda Fung; Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Douglas Alan Holloway, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff.
Appearance of witness waived.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Jung Kim, individually and dba Welker Cleaners as follows:
Damages/Principal: $32,977.20.
Interest:$1,408.68.
Costs: $350.00.
Attorney's Fees: $2,500.00.
For a total of: $37,236.38.
Judgment signed in Open Court.
